query: Where to see traditional kabuki outside of Tokyo and Kyoto.
reasoning: The cross_program_advisory surfaces 4 correct non-Tokyo/non-Kyoto kabuki venues (金丸座/Kotohira, 内子座/Uchiko, 八千代座/Yamaga, 康楽館/Kosaka) with QIDs and designations — authoritative data is present. However the tool was called with no keyword filter (Rule A: score data returned, not tool choice), and the canonical_entities list includes 歌舞伎座 (Tokyo) and 南座 (Kyoto) without flagging the 'outside' constraint — per Rule B, constraint_handling takes the single strict hit. intent_understanding drops to 3 because the advisory structure is indirect and the out-of-scope venues are mixed in.
missing_data: Performance schedules beyond April Konpira Kabuki; access/transport details for each regional venue; explicit note that 歌舞伎座 and 南座 are excluded by the query constraint.
improvement_hint: When intent classifier fires on '歌舞伎' + regional constraint, auto-call get_traditional_arts with keyword='歌舞伎' and post-filter to exclude Tokyo (13) and Kyoto (26) prefecture entities before returning canonical_entities.
